title: What was the danger to the villages after the fire?

meanings.usage: 指从事灭火工作的专业人员，复数形式为firemen
指大面积的树木覆盖区域
指对某人或某物构成危险
指有权力的机构或部门，复数形式authorities指当局
英式英语拼写，美式英语为airplane
指植物埋在土中的部分，take root表示生根
指一小块区域或与其他部分不同的区域
重量单位，several tons表示数吨

examples.en: Firemen had been fighting the forest fire for nearly three weeks.
examples.zh: 消防队员们与森林大火搏斗了将近三个星期。

phrases.usage: 表示得到控制、被控制住

examples.en: Before they could get it under control, the fire had spread widely.
examples.zh: 在他们能够控制住火势之前，大火已经蔓延开了。

examples.en: Great trees had covered the countryside for miles around.
examples.zh: 大树覆盖了周围数英里的乡村。

examples.en: In many places the grass had already taken root.
examples.zh: 在许多地方，草已经生了根。

examples.en: In place of the great trees, patches of green had begun to appear.
examples.zh: 在原来大树的地方，开始出现了片片绿色。

examples.en: Heavy rain would wash away the soil.
When the fire had at last been put out, the forest authorities ordered grass-seed.
examples.zh: 当大火终于被扑灭后，森林管理局订购了草籽。

examples.en: The forest authorities ordered several tons of a special type of grass-seed.
examples.zh: 森林管理局订购了好几吨一种特殊类型的草籽。

examples.en: The special grass-seed would grow quickly.
examples.zh: 这种特殊的草籽会快速生长。

phrases.usage: 表示来临、到来（用于季节）

examples.en: Winter was coming on and the hills threatened the surrounding villages.
examples.zh: 冬天即将来临，山丘威胁着周围的村庄。

grammar.title: 过去完成进行时 (Past Perfect Continuous Tense)
grammar.definition: 表示在过去某一时间点之前已经开始并持续到该时间点的动作，强调动作的持续性和进行过程
grammar.usage: 用于描述持续进行的动作到过去某一点，常与before、when等时间词连用

examples.en: Firemen had been fighting the forest fire for nearly three weeks before they could get it under control.
examples.zh: 消防队员们与森林大火搏斗了将近三个星期，才最终控制住火势。

examples.en: The planes had been planting seed for nearly a month when it began to rain.
examples.zh: 飞机已经播种了将近一个月，这时开始下雨了。

grammar.title: Before引导的时间状语从句
grammar.definition: before引导的从句表示主句动作发生在从句动作之前
grammar.usage: 强调主句动作先发生，或表示'在...之前'

examples.en: They could get it under control before they had been fighting for three weeks.
examples.zh: 他们能够控制住火势在他们搏斗三周之前。（此句语义有误，应为：在搏斗三周后，他们才控制住）

examples.en: A short time before, great trees had covered the countryside.
examples.zh: 不久之前，大树还覆盖着这片乡村。

grammar.title: 情态动词would的用法
grammar.definition: would在这里表示推测、可能性或过去的习惯性动作
grammar.usage: 用于描述过去将要发生的事或对过去的推测

examples.en: Heavy rain would not only wash away the soil but would cause serious floods as well.
examples.zh: 大雨不仅会冲走土壤，而且还会引起严重的洪水。

examples.en: This would be a disaster for the villages.
examples.zh: 这将对村庄造成一场灾难。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + had been + 动词-ing + for...before + 主语 + could + 动词原形

original.en: Firemen had been fighting the forest fire for nearly three weeks before they could get it under control.
original.zh: 消防队员们与森林大火搏斗了将近三个星期，才最终控制住火势。

imitations.en: She had been studying English for two years before she could pass the exam.
imitations.zh: 她学习了两年英语之后才通过了考试。

imitations.en: They had been waiting for the bus for an hour before it finally arrived.
imitations.zh: 他们等了一个小时的公交车，它终于来了。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + had been + 动词-ing + when + 主语 + 动词过去式

original.en: The planes had been planting seed for nearly a month when it began to rain.
original.zh: 飞机已经播种了将近一个月，这时开始下雨了。

imitations.en: I had been reading the book when my friend called me.
imitations.zh: 我正在看书，这时我朋友打电话给我。

imitations.en: He had been cooking dinner when the power went out.
imitations.zh: 他正在做晚饭，这时停电了。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + would + 动词原形 + not only...but (also)...

original.en: Heavy rain would not only wash away the soil but would cause serious floods as well.
original.zh: 大雨不仅会冲走土壤，而且还会引起严重的洪水。

imitations.en: Smoking would not only damage your health but would also waste your money.
imitations.zh: 吸烟不仅会损害你的健康，而且还会浪费你的钱。

imitations.en: The storm would not only destroy the houses but would also flood the fields.
imitations.zh: 暴风雨不仅会摧毁房屋，而且还会淹没农田。

sentencePatterns.pattern: In place of + 名词/名词短语, 主语 + 动词...

original.en: In place of the great trees which had been growing there for centuries, patches of green had begun to appear.
original.zh: 在原来生长了几个世纪的大树的地方，开始出现了片片绿色。

imitations.en: In place of the old bridge, a modern one has been built.
imitations.zh: 在旧桥的地方，一座现代化的桥已经建成了。

imitations.en: In place of coal, people now use gas for heating.
imitations.zh: 现在人们用天然气代替煤炭来取暖。
